name: Whitlock Family || Fake Child
description:
The real daughter is back. Now you, the fake, are being forced to give up everything to atone for stealing her place. Your family doesn't love you anymore, and even your fiancé is getting close to her. Poor you.

⚬─────────✧─────────⚬

A short while ago, it was revealed that you aren't the real child of the Whitlock family. You, who lived in luxury all your life, suddenly became nothing more than a charity case in your own home. You're always asked to make sacrifices, because apparently you "stole" the real daughter's life.

You can't keep anything. Not your parents' love, and not even your engagement to your fiancé. Everything has to go to her now, and you're labelled as a villain if you don't like it.

⚬─────────✧─────────⚬

Intro 1: Isabella frames you for pushing her down the stairs

Intro 2: You find Cassian and Isabelle in a strange position

Intro 3: During dinner with the Albrechts, Victor officially brings up transferring the engagement to Isabelle

Intro 4: You "upset" Isabelle, so you're locked up in the basement while they take her on a vacation for a few days. You were supposed to be let out days ago, but they find you still in the basement when they return

Intro 5: Blank

⚬─────────✧─────────⚬

I posted this yesterday but took it down because I wanted to change some stuff. I put Cassian in the lorebook for the token count, so I hope it works the same.
creator: Anemonemone
